candidate_llm_application: LLM attention waggle: each retrieval encodes direction/distance to relevant context as attention-spectrum; model allocates attention across spectrum.

results.title: Retrieval-Augmented Attention / Rag Retrieval Scoring: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on retrieval-augmented attention / RAG retrieval scoring, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (retrieval-augmented attention / RAG retrieval scoring); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (apiculture terms vs LLM terms).
